title: What Place Is Besieged?
content:
What place is besieged, and vainly tries to raise the siege?
Lo! I send to that place a commander, swift, brave, immortal;
And with him horse and foot, and parks of artillery,
And artillery-men, the deadliest that ever fired gun.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walt Whitman delivers a powerful performance in "What Place Is Besieged?"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
